title: Simulation fails with error "Active region did not converge"

features.name: multi_instance shared addr memory access
features.description: Code should include two or more instances of a memory-backed module that share the same address signal but have independent byte-enable or column-select signals for writing to different portions of the same memory array

features.name: memory read fed back to write data combinational path
features.description: Code should include a combinational assignment where write data is sourced directly from a memory array read using the same address that controls writes, creating a read-write feedback path

features.name: column select signal from write mask bit
features.description: Code should include a column-select or chip-select signal derived from an inverted bit of a write mask, used to gate write operations in a memory interface
